$comment: Claude Code settings for the Linus repo. PostToolUse hooks run ruff format, isort-via-ruff, and ruff check on Python file edits. See CLAUDE.md for the full engineering-conventions section.

hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then ruff format --line-length 120 "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || true; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then ruff check --select I --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || true; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then ruff check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || true; fi
